description: Set up environment: create feature branch from master, install dependencies, verify baseline tests and lint pass
steps: Create feature branch 'feat/replace-network-init-with-uroot' from master using conventional naming
Run 'go mod download' to ensure all dependencies are available
Run 'make test' to confirm baseline tests pass
Run 'make lint' to confirm baseline lint passes
Run 'make build' to confirm baseline build succeeds
acceptance_criteria: Feature branch exists and is checked out
make test passes with zero failures
make lint passes with zero issues
make build produces the k3os binary
verification: make build exits with code 0 and ./k3os file exists
findings: All baseline checks pass on Go 1.25.1 with golangci-lint 2.1.6. Tests run cleanly with -race. Build produces CGO_ENABLED=0 static binary named 'k3os'. u-root is already in go.mod as a dependency.
